payload.answer: The new information updates the prior planned/open state for the MVP scope: the Brain Slack agent MVP is now implemented. Do not infer that all broader Brain Slack agent work is complete unless separately stated.
citations: Existing project state: The Brain Slack agent is planned, status=open.
New: The Brain Slack agent MVP is now implemented.
payload.decision: commit_new_status_update; treat as a temporal transition from planned/open to implemented for the MVP scope, without assuming the full Brain Slack agent project is complete

entity_resolution.reason: The new statement refers to the existing Brain Slack agent project, but specifically to its MVP scope; it should be linked rather than treated as an unrelated entity.

memory_cards.statement: The Brain Slack agent MVP is now implemented.

details: Committed durable memory that the Brain Slack agent MVP is implemented.
Preserved ambiguity between MVP completion and full project completion.

repair_options: Mark the previous planned/open status as superseded for the MVP scope only.
Retain any broader Brain Slack agent project status as open if non-MVP work remains unspecified.
